created.description: Timestamp when the log stream object was created

id.description: Unique identifier for the log stream

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the log stream object was last updated

name.description: Unique name for the log stream object

status.description: Lifecycle status of the log stream object

type.description:
Specifies the streaming provider used

Supported providers:
  * `aws_eventbridge` ([AWS EventBridge](https://aws.amazon.com/eventbridge))
  * `splunk_cloud_logstreaming` ([Splunk Cloud](https://www.splunk.com/en_us/software/splunk-cloud-platform.html))

Select the provider type to see provider-specific configurations in the `settings` property:

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the current status of an application using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

method.description: HTTP method allowed for the resource
HTTP method allowed for the resource
